objective: Complete the Tushare daily-only raw daily acquisition from 2000-01-01 through 2026-05-28 using cache/resume after the interrupted V3.42 run.
forbidden_actions: Do not call endpoints other than tushare.daily.
Do not run adjusted-return, valuation, PIT constituent, factor, or portfolio research.
Do not delete existing daily files; use cache/resume only.
Do not remove or weaken the manual interface queue.
acceptance: All business-date outputs from 2000-01-01 through 2026-05-28 are either acquired/cached with rows or explicitly empty.
All acquired dates pass duplicate and OHLCV quality checks or are explicitly reported.
The manual data interface queue remains available.
The run produces a completion summary with coverage, row counts, error counts, empty-date counts, and remaining queued dates.
